path: Problem: Return a group-level maximum only on the row(s) where that maximum occurs; otherwise return blank
Action: Use IF to compare the current row value to an array-calculated MAX over values filtered by a matching group key (MAX with IF as an array formula)

Observation: MAX(IF([key_range]=[current_key],[value_range])) computes the maximum within the matching group; comparing the current value to that maximum flags only the max row(s) (ties will return the value on each tied row)
